summary: Missing test file & fixtures—workflow references New-BuildMatrix.Tests.ps1 and fixture files that aren't provided. Workflow L19,40: actions not pinned to SHA (critical security violation). L25-29: actionlint curl lacks `set -e` error handling. L48: -SkipPublisherCheck security risk. New-BuildMatrix.ps1: no Set-StrictMode; Get-MatrixSize (L48-51) doesn't validate inputs are iterable. Entry-point logic confusing. Would not run as-is.
